detailed_events: 08:15 - Signal system failure detected on T42-A15 circuit
08:16 - All 4/5/6 trains held at safe locations
08:22 - Field supervisor deployed to Times Square platform
08:35 - First train moved through single track
08:45 - Normal service restored on all tracks

expected_summary: 30-minute signal failure at Times Square-42nd Street caused delays on 4/5/6 lines. MEIT team implemented single tracking for recovery. Service fully restored by 08:45.

detailed_events: 16:42 - Traction power loss reported Harvard-Porter section
16:42 - All Red Line trains held south of Central Square
17:15 - Power fault isolated to transformer TR-45

expected_summary: 58-minute power outage suspended Red Line service north of Central. Bus shuttle provided during repair. Power restored via backup transformer, normal service resumed at 17:40.
